tasks.input_data: Write a Python function is_palindrome(text: str) -> bool that returns True when text reads the same forward and backward after case-folding and removing non-alphanumeric characters.
tasks.expected_output: A type-annotated implementation where is_palindrome('Never odd or even') returns True and is_palindrome('OpenCode') returns False.

tasks.input_data: Given an iterable of (team, points) pairs, implement totals_by_team that returns a dictionary of each team's summed points without sorting the input.
tasks.expected_output: A linear-time Python implementation producing {'red': 7, 'blue': 3} for [('red', 2), ('blue', 3), ('red', 5)].

tasks.input_data: Implement a synchronous context manager that temporarily sets an environment variable and restores its exact previous state, including removing it if it was originally absent.
tasks.expected_output: A context manager whose restoration works after both normal completion and an exception raised inside the with block.
